raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Current challenges","name":"What has been the most challenging aspect of your role recently?","description":"Identifies specific areas causing difficulty or frustration in her role.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3}]},{"label":"Stakeholder relationships","name":"How are your interactions with doctors and administrative staff going?","description":"Explores her relationships with key stakeholders and any underlying issues.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3}]},{"label":"Delegation effectiveness","name":"How do you feel about the way you're delegating tasks to junior nurses?","description":"Assesses her comfort level and effectiveness in delegating responsibilities.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Communication clarity","name":"What feedback, if any, have you received about your communication style?","description":"Surfaces any feedback she might have received regarding her communication.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Impact on care","name":"What do you see as your biggest impact on patient care recently?","description":"Explores her perceived impact on patient care and team outcomes.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Addressing negativity","name":"I've noticed some negativity in your outlook — what's behind that?","description":"Directly addresses the noted negativity to understand its root cause.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Growth opportunities","name":"What areas are you looking to grow or develop in over the next quarter?","description":"Identifies her focus areas for personal and professional development.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3}]},{"label":"Priority alignment","name":"Are your current priorities clear, or is there something you need more clarity on?","description":"Checks if she feels aligned with her role priorities and expectations.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Support needs","name":"What support do you need from me to succeed in your role?","description":"Identifies any additional support she might require from her manager.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next steps commitment","name":"Given what we've discussed, what's the first thing you'll focus on improving?","description":"Encourages commitment to an action item based on the conversation.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]}]}
